div.p: Search farmers and submit consent requests.

input.placeholder: Search by Farmer ID or National ID...

div.p: Choose a verification method first. Consent fields will only appear after successful verification.

div.div: Complete Fayda OTP or Face + Liveness verification to unlock the consent form.

div.style: background: transparent !important; border: none !important; box-shadow: none !important;
max-width: 400px !important; margin: 0 auto; border-radius: 1.5rem; min-height: 620px !important; height: auto !important; border: none !important;

div.class: modal-header border-0 pb-0 position-absolute end-0 top-0
modal-body consent_otp_panel px-4 py-5 d-flex flex-column justify-content-center mt-3

div.div: A verified OTP matching the farmer's identifier is required to auto-approve the request.

div.class: bg-light rounded-3 p-3 mb-4 text-center border
div.div: Request OTP to verify the selected farmer.
A verified OTP or successful face + liveness verification will auto-approve this request on submit.

label.class: form-label text-muted small fw-bold text-uppercase ms-1 mb-1

div.class: input-group input-group-lg mb-2 shadow-sm rounded-3 overflow-hidden

div.style: background: transparent !important; border: none !important; box-shadow: none !important;
border-radius: 1.5rem; max-width: 880px !important; min-height: fit-content !important; height: auto !important; margin: 0 auto; border: none !important;

div.class: modal-header border-0 pb-0 position-absolute end-0 top-0

div.div: Complete both checks in one step: face match against the selected farmer and random liveness challenge.

div.class: camera-wrapper position-relative w-100 bg-light shadow-sm border d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center overflow-hidden mb-3 modern-card-shadow

video.style: object-fit: cover; position: absolute; top:0; left:0;

img.style: object-fit: cover; position: absolute; top:0; left:0;

div.class: camera-placeholder text-center text-muted p-4 position-absolute w-100 h-100 d-flex flex-column align-items-center justify-content-center
d-flex justify-content-center gap-2 flex-wrap w-100 camera-controls mt-auto

button.class: btn btn-outline-success rounded-pill px-3 flex-grow-1 border-2 fw-semibold
btn rounded-pill px-3 flex-grow-1 d-none shadow-sm fw-bold
btn btn-outline-secondary rounded-pill px-3 flex-grow-1 d-none border-2 fw-semibold
btn btn-outline-danger rounded-pill px-3 flex-grow-1 d-none border-2 fw-semibold

div.class: text-danger small mt-3 fw-bold text-center d-none w-100 bg-danger bg-opacity-10 rounded p-2 border border-danger border-opacity-25

img.alt: Farmer profile reference for face match

div.class: match-results w-100 p-3 bg-white border shadow-sm mt-auto
consent_face_match_status is-not-attempted fw-bold flex-grow-1 mb-2 text-dark

div.div: Challenge prompt and face score will appear here.

div.p: Verification has succeeded. You can now complete and submit the consent request.

div.div: No data fields are configured for your consent partner. Please contact admin.

button.title: No data fields configured for your consent partner.

div.t: Consent request submitted and automatically approved after Fayda OTP verification.
Consent request submitted and automatically approved after face + liveness verification.
Consent request submitted and automatically approved.
Fayda OTP verification passed, but automatic approval could not be completed. The request was created and remains pending.
Face + liveness verification passed, but automatic approval could not be completed. The request was created and remains pending.
Verification passed, but automatic approval could not be completed. The request was created and remains pending.
Please search and select a farmer first.
Invalid farmer selected.
Farmer not found.
Access denied. Please contact your administrator.
Consent reason is required.
Invalid consent reason selected.
Select at least one data field.
Attachment is required.
Attachment must be 10MB or smaller.
Camera photo must be 10MB or smaller.
Invalid camera image data.
Invalid camera timestamp.
Invalid camera capture location.
An error occurred while creating the consent request. Please try again or contact support.

div.p: Review farmer, verification, and requested access.

t.t-if: review_request.auto_approved_via_face_match or review_request.auto_approved_via_otp or review_request.face_match_message or review_request.fayda_otp_message

div.t: Automatically approved via face match.
Automatically approved via Fayda OTP.

t.t-if: review_request.portal_capture_latitude is not False and review_request.portal_capture_longitude is not False

div.p: No consent requests yet. Search a farmer and submit a request above.
